# mlir-opt --convert-complex-to-libm crashes with invalid cast to IntegerAttr on affine.linearize_index

**Author:** mlirBug
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/178204
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** mlir:affine, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-02-28T11:15:29Z

## Body

mlir-opt version: 22.1.0-rc1
The crash is caused by an invalid llvm::cast<mlir::IntegerAttr> from a generic
mlir::Attribute, leading to a hard assertion failure instead of a diagnostic.

```
mlir-opt --convert-complex-to-libm test.mlir
```
```mlir
module {
  func.func @main() {
    %0 = ub.poison : index
    %1 = index.constant 0
    %2 = gpu.thread_id  x
    %3 = arm_sme.streaming_vl <byte>
    %4 = async.create_group %3 : !async.group
    %5 = arith.constant 0 : index
    %6 = affine.linearize_index [%0, %1] by (%5) : index
    return
  }
}
```
```
mlir-opt: llvm-project-llvmorg-22.1.0-rc1/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:560: decltype(auto) llvm::cast(const From&) [with To = mlir::IntegerAttr; From = mlir::Attribute]: Assertion `isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: llvmorg-22.1.0-install/bin/mlir-opt --convert-complex-to-libm test.mlir
 #0 0x00005d1afc695e32 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (llvmorg-22.1.0-install/bin/mlir-opt+0x252fe32)
 #1 0x00005d1afc6925af llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (llvmorg-22.1.0-install/bin/mlir-opt+0x252c5af)
 #2 0x00005d1afc6926fc SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) Signals.cpp:0:0
 #3 0x000072ae62245330 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x45330)
 #4 0x000072ae6229eb2c __pthread_kill_implementation ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:44:76
 #5 0x000072ae6229eb2c __pthread_kill_internal ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:78:10
 #6 0x000072ae6229eb2c pthread_kill ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:89:10
 #7 0x000072ae6224527e raise ./signal/../sysdeps/posix/raise.c:27:6
 #8 0x000072ae622288ff abort ./stdlib/abort.c:81:7
 #9 0x000072ae6222881b _nl_load_domain ./intl/loadmsgcat.c:1177:9
#10 0x000072ae6223b517 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x3b517)
```
